inputs.titre: Marriage of Berthe of Burgundy and Robert II

reason: The image depicts a scene that is mostly consistent with the Early Middle Ages, specifically the marriage of Berthe of Burgundy and Robert II (996). The stone architecture with arched windows, the clothing of the individuals (tunic with embroidery, woolen cloak), and the use of candles for lighting are all appropriate. The lighting and general atmosphere also align with the period. However, the placement of candles in the metal sconces on the wall seems a bit too perfect and modern. Also the gown design could be more accurate to the time period. Overall, the image presents a plausible representation with minor potential issues.
